current_run.description: Given an oracle that computes the parity of a specific cyclic polynomial of degree 2 over GF(2), find the secret coefficients of the polynomial. The polynomial is of the form f(x) = sum_{i=0}^{N-1} (a_i * x_i * x_{(i+1) mod N} + b_i * x_i), where a_i and b_i are secret bits. The oracle computes f(x) mod 2.
